NAT.RepeatedResearchProjectDef.label: TEST
NAT.RepeatedResearchProjectDef.description: Extract bioferrite directly from captured entities. Use it to craft weapons and apparel at a crafting spot or bioferrite shaper.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->extracted an organic compound from a rapidly mutating flesh sample
subject_story->stripped and boiled the flesh of a harbinger tree
subject_story->investigated reports of an archotech phenomenon
